title: Data, API, Algorithm, and Domain Invariants · Claim Repair Board
summary: A preserved decision record for data, api, algorithm, and domain invariants contains one plausible evidence, scope, design, implementation, evaluation, or ownership defect. Find the first unsupported claim before changing the product. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in executable domain and interface assurance suite and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Formalize critical identities, states, quantities, relationships, transitions, and impossible conditions in domain language.
Validate untrusted input for structure, semantics, authorization, limits, normalization, provenance, and version before trusted use.
State preconditions, invariant, termination, result, counterexample, complexity, scale boundary, and alternative for consequential algorithms.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Domain Invariant
steps.instruction:
debug case — Schemas and endpoints look complete while identity, authorization, concurrency, numerical, lifecycle, compatibility, and recovery invariants remain implicit. The debug variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Formalize critical identities, states, quantities, relationships, transitions, and impossible conditions in domain language.

Inspect the Domain Invariant trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Domain Invariant.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for formalize critical identities, states, quantities, relationships, transitions, and impossible conditions in domain language. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Domain Invariant, keep Domain Invariant connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: For Domain Invariant, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Domain Invariant, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Domain Invariant precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Domain Invariant, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: Schemas and endpoints look complete while identity, authorization, concurrency, numerical, lifecycle, compatibility, and recovery invariants remain implicit. The debug variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Formalize critical identities, states, quantities, relationships, transitions, and impossible conditions in domain language.

stimulus.title: Domain Invariant case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Schemas and endpoints look complete while identity, authorization, concurrency, numerical, lifecycle, compatibility, and recovery invariants remain implicit. The debug variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Formalize critical identities, states, quantities, relationships, transitions, and impossible conditions in domain language.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Types and schemas express every important invariant.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Formalize critical identities, states, quantities, relationships, transitions, and impossible conditions in domain language. Artifact under review: executable domain and interface assurance suite.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Domain Invariant, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Domain Invariant record says executable domain and interface assurance suite looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect the failure record evidence boundary for Domain Invariant.

For inspect the failure record, apply Domain Invariant without its stated preconditions, omit the executable domain and interface assurance suite trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Domain Invariant for executable domain and interface assurance suite.

steps.title: Publish the incident record · Debug Data Recovery Invariant
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Data Recovery Invariant: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Schemas and endpoints look complete while identity, authorization, concurrency, numerical, lifecycle, compatibility, and recovery invariants remain implicit. The debug variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Prove backup, restore, migration, replay, reconciliation, and deletion preserve or intentionally transform domain invariants.
